title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development workflow, reduce costs, and enhance Claude's capabilities. The plugins include web scraping tools, model switching, token usage monitoring, and Anthropic's built-in skill plugins for legal, design, and security.
